caption:
The 9-to-5 is already over.

Most people just haven't noticed yet.

36% of the US workforce already works fractionally or on a portfolio basis. Not as freelancers. As specialists with pricing power.

AI handles the routine. C-suites now rent specialists for exactly the hours they need — and pay a premium.

Your full-time role was bundling your value for someone else.

Fractional work unbundles it.
You keep the premium.
You choose the clients.

The people who move now are locking in the best clients. In 3 years this market will be crowded. Right now it is wide open.

What would you do with Tuesday mornings free and more money than now?

That is not a fantasy. That is fractional.

#fractional #futureofwork #careerdesign
